<!-- Results vary by hardware, OS load, and compiler version. Regenerate on the same machine for valid comparison. -->

# C/Rust Regression Benchmark (145 tests)

- C runs: 20, Rust runs: 21
- rule: remove 2 smallest + 2 largest, then compute mean/variance on remaining 6
- variance is population variance over the trimmed 6 samples
